theme: Jarayonlar, signallar, systemd, journald — to'liq kun

tasks.title: Jarayonlarni sana
tasks.why: Serverda nima ishlayotganini bilish — birinchi diagnostika qadami.
steps: Ishlab turgan jarayonlar SONINI yoz:  ps aux | wc -l > procs.txt
tasks.expect: procs.txt ichида jarayonlar soni (10 dan ko'p)

tasks.title: Eng och jarayonlar (xotira)
tasks.why: Xotirani kim yeyapti? --sort bilan og'irlarini tepaga chiqarasan.
steps: Eng ko'p xotira ishlatayotgan 3 jarayonni yoz:
tasks.expect: topmem.txt — eng ko'p RAM ishlatayotgan jarayonlar

tasks.title: 3 ta fon jarayoni
tasks.why: Fon (&) — uzoq ishlarni parallel yuritish. Drill: tez ishga tushir.
steps: Uchta fon jarayoni boshla:  sleep 300 & sleep 301 & sleep 302 &

tasks.title: PID larni top (pgrep)
tasks.why: pgrep — nom bo'yicha PID topadi. Boshqarishning birinchi qadami.
steps: sleep jarayonlari PID larini yoz:  pgrep -f 'sleep 30' > pids.txt

tasks.title: Hammasini to'xtat (pkill)
tasks.why: pkill -f — nom bo'yicha ko'p jarayonni bir zarbда to'xtatadi.

tasks.title: Fon jarayoni: sleep 500
tasks.why: Nazorat qilinadigan bitta uzoq jarayon — keyin uni topib, to'xtatamiz.

tasks.title: PID ni topib yoz
tasks.why: Jarayonni boshqarish uchun avval uning PID (raqam) ini bilish kerak.
steps: PID ni (faqat raqam) work/pid.txt ga yoz

tasks.title: Jarayonni to'xtat (kill)
tasks.why: Runaway yoki keraksiz jarayonni to'xtatish — kill PID bilan.

tasks.title: Servis holatini hujjatla
tasks.why: systemd servisi tirikmi? systemctl is-active — SRE ishining yuragi.
steps: devops-quizbot holatini ol:  systemctl is-active devops-quizbot

tasks.title: Servis loglari (journald)
tasks.why: Servis nima deyayapti? systemctl status / journalctl — debug uchun shart.
steps: Holatini batafsil ko'r:  systemctl status devops-quizbot --no-pager
Natijani work/jlog.txt ga yoz:  systemctl status devops-quizbot --no-pager > jlog.txt
tasks.expect: jlog.txt ичида servis nomi va holati

tasks.title: Eng ko'p CPU jarayon
tasks.why: CPU 100% — sekinlik sababi. --sort=-%cpu aybdorni tepaga chiqaradi.
steps: Eng ko'p CPU ishlatayotgan 3 jarayonni yoz:

tasks.title: Shubhali jarayonni top (Day-1 grep)
tasks.why: Day-1 grep ko'nikmasi — endi ps natijasi ustида. 98% CPU = shubhali (miner!).
steps: Eng ko'p CPU (98%) shubhali jarayon qatorini grep bilan top va cb/suspect.txt ga yoz

tasks.title: Skript + ruxsat (Day-2)
tasks.why: Day-2 chmod +x ko'nikmasi — endi jarayon sanaydigan skriptga.
steps: cb/pscount.sh yarat (#!/bin/bash): ishlab turgan jarayonlar sonini chiqarsin
tasks.expect: pscount.sh executable va ishga tushganда son chiqaradi

tasks.title: Skeletni qur
tasks.why: Mini-loyiha: 'Process Monitor'. Avval tartibli tuzilma.

tasks.title: Jarayonlar suratini ol (skript)
tasks.why: Monitoring yuragi: hozir nima ishlayotganini suratga olish.
steps: monitor/bin/snap.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash): ps aux ni chiqarsin
Ishga tushir va saqla:  bash monitor/bin/snap.sh > monitor/logs/snapshot.txt
tasks.expect: snapshot.txt — ps aux natijasi (PID ustuni bor)

tasks.title: Eng og'ir jarayonni aniqla
tasks.why: Monitorга eng ko'p CPU jarayonni qo'shamiz.
steps: Eng yuqori CPU jarayon qatorini yoz:

tasks.title: Servis salomatligi
tasks.why: Monitorга servis holatini ham qo'shamiz (Day-3 svc ko'nikmasi).
steps: devops-quizbot holatini yoz:  systemctl is-active devops-quizbot > monitor/logs/health.txt

tasks.title: Hisobotni birlashtir (skript)
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: top + health ni bitta hisobotга birlashtirish.
steps: monitor/bin/report.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash): top va health fayllarini birlashtirsin
Masalan:  echo '== PROCESS REPORT =='; echo 'Top CPU:'; cat monitor/logs/top.txt; echo 'Servis:'; cat monitor/logs/health.txt

tasks.title: BOSS — 'Signal' (guardian + SIGUSR1)
tasks.why: Jarayon + signal mahoratini sinash: fonda ishga tushir, PID top, SIGUSR1 yubor.

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
tasks.why: Tushuntira olish — tushunganingning isboti.
steps: SIGTERM (15) va SIGKILL (9) farqini + qachon qaysi birini ishlatishni ustozга ayt
